name: manage-db
description: Manage PostgreSQL databases: start/stop cluster, create/drop DBs, run SQL, list tables, set passwords, check connections with custom host/port/user.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: status, start, stop, create-db, drop-db, run-sql, list-tables, set-password, create-user, list-dbs, check-connection, change-port, reset-port

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional args depending on action (db name, SQL, username, password, version)

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into first

examples.call: /app/.preinstalled_scripts/manage-db/main.sh --port=15432 --user=test check-connection && /app/.preinstalled_scripts/manage-db/main.sh create-db myapp_test && /app/.preinstalled_scripts/manage-db/main.sh run-sql myapp_test "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables"
examples.expected: Connection OK, database created, tables listed

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses 8+ separate steps (pg_isready, pg_lsclusters, pg_ctlcluster, psql connection attempts, su-user switching, ALTER USER, sed config edit + restart for port change) into one script with auto-fallback, saving 5+ steps per database operation.
